name: xtypes_decode
description: A Cyclone publisher publishes a custom IDL type (struct Beat { uint32 seq; string status; float32 battery_pct; }). TopicForge's peek_dds_samples should attempt dynamic XTypes decode via cyclonedds.dynamic ; on success samples carry _decode_status='full' or 'partial', on miss '_decode_status=raw' with annotated bytes. Fast DDS is skipped because its 2.6.x dynamic XTypes binding is partial.

publishers.idl: struct Beat { uint32 seq; string status; float32 battery_pct; };
